overview: Audit REST API for the NetApp Console

ai-gen.title: Retrieve an Audit service API account record
ai-gen.summary: Retrieve account records using a specific account public ID.
ai-gen.keywords: account records,accountId,audit records,public ID,NetApp Console,account audits,record retrieval,user audits,user data,account search
ai-gen.lead: Retrieves account records in the Audit service API using a specified account public ID, allowing you to access detailed audit information for that account.

ai-gen.title: Retrieve an Audit service API record
ai-gen.summary: Retrieve records using account ID, service, and request ID.
ai-gen.keywords: records retrieval,account records,service records,request id records,audit records,netapp records,ontap records,retrieve records,account service records,record retrieval
ai-gen.lead: Retrieves specified audit records by account, service, and request ID, allowing you to access detailed information for auditing purposes.

ai-gen.title: Retrieve an Audit Service API filter option
ai-gen.summary: Retrieve filter options using a specific account ID.
ai-gen.keywords: audit options,filter options,account id,netapp console,user token,retrieve options,filter by account,netapp ontap
ai-gen.lead: Retrieves audit filter options by a specified account ID in the Audit service API, allowing you to configure and manage audit settings effectively.
